Bernardo Castello

3 works in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Sketches of Seated Warrior, Various Figures
by Bernardo Castello
Italy · 1585–1595 · Pen and brown ink
Solomon and the Queen of Sheba (recto); Sketch of the Queen of Sheba (verso)
by Bernardo Castello
Italy · 1590–1599 · Pen and iron gall ink on ivory laid paper (recto and verso)
Two Seated Kings of Judah; Josiah and Hezekiah
by Bernardo Castello
Italy · 1591 · Pen and brown ink with brush and pale brown wash
